characters.name: Akuda
characters.description: Akudais a sea-monster who resides in the Pandasian sea. Akuda resembles a mash-up of many creatures: having a pinniped body, a bear-head, a whale-tail and whiskers. Like any animal he can be rowdy if he feels threatened, but is normally docile and even compassionate. Like any animal he can be rowdy if he feels threatened, but is normally docile and even compassionate.

characters.name: Bingo
characters.description: Bingois the sister ofCongo. She is a small but tough little panda, who will always fight her way out of a situation. She is an experienced athlete, and cares for her twin brother Congo. She also has feelings for Oscar, which she'll rarely admit. characters.name: Congo
characters.description: Congois the brother ofBingo, though he is much larger than her. He cares very much about Bingo, and will fight anybody to protect her. Congo will often carry her around. He is an experienced athlete, and slightly paranoid as he didn't trust the other warriors in the beginning. He cares very much about Bingo, and will fight anybody to protect her. characters.name: Cool
characters.description: Coolis the boyfriend ofLove. He later becomesKing Kulu. He is portrayed as an arrogant, self-centered panda, who cares only about himself (and Love). Cool has a great disliking for Toby, and sees him as competition for Love's affection, until Cool finally accepts Toby as his friend. He built his own battle robot, thePandabot, and his own car, theCoolmobile. He is portrayed as an arrogant, self-centered panda, who cares only about himself (and Love). Cool has a great disliking for Toby, and sees him as competition for Love's affection, until Cool finally accepts Toby as his friend. He built his own battle robot, thePandabot, and his own car, theCoolmobile.

characters.name: Deelbug
characters.description: TheDeelbug(sometimes calledDeedlebug) is a monster created byKing Audie. The Deelbug is known for being permanently hungry similar to that of the wendigo. Once it has eaten enough it will bulk-up from its original size (along with its host if it parasitizes someone).

characters.name: Didi
characters.description: DidiorDeedeeis the yellow dinosaur pet that hangs withToby. He is often gluttonous, but he can be serious when he has to. He is able to breathe fire, which is ironic as he isn't considered a dragon (and real dinosaurs cannot breathe fire). He is often gluttonous, but he can be serious when he has to.

characters.description: Fifiis a seal/ostrich-looking creature similar toDidi. She is generally kind and friendly, like a pet even though she's clearly a wild animal. Like Didi, Fifi and her kind are able to breathe fire. She is generally kind and friendly, like a pet even though she's clearly a wild animal.

characters.name: Galoo
characters.description: Galoois an evil pterodactyl/bat monster that created byKing Audiemade out of clay. He is the voiced by in EnglishPeter Cugno. He is the smartest of King Audie's minions and often attacking the Bean Warriors and tormentingGoldandSilver. characters.name: King Audie
characters.description: King Audieis the first major villain. He is the voiced byBill Colgatewho playedKing Pannoin the Anime series He seems to be a skilled warlock due to using dark-magic commonly. He often wields a scepter which grants his powers, the sole bean in it occasionally forges a mini-bean capsule who's powers varies, able to unleash a swarm of flying turtle-like drones that can possess whoever they attach themselves to or phase into a being and turn them into a monster.

characters.name: King Kulu
characters.description: King Kuluis the result ofCoolbeing transformed byKing Audie's power. He seems to behave exactly likeKing Audie, except a little crueler. He possesses the same powers as Audie, mostly likely because he had striped them from him. He seems to behave exactly likeKing Audie, except a little crueler.

characters.name: Love
characters.description: Loveis a white panda caught in a love triangle betweenCoolandToby. She is the daughter of theBean T.Vowner. She is a very kind young panda, who always cares about others. Though she always seems like a damsel in distress, she is really the warrior of the Adora-Bean. Her compassion towards others makes her a natural when it comes to saving the day. Love has been friends with Cool for a long time, but she didn't seem to return his infatuation with her and she appeared to have a crush on Toby. characters.name: Max
characters.description: Maxis Oscar's food obsessed camera man. When he andOscarwere children, Oscar found him floating in the sea, and saved his life. Max forgot where he came from, and became Oscar's best friend. Later on in the series, Max finds out that he was born on the center island whereYanilives. He is typically gluttonous, but he does have a serious side when lives are at stake, and is also brave. He is typically gluttonous, but he does have a serious side when lives are at stake, and is also brave.

characters.name: Mi
characters.description: Miis a precocious fairy. At first, she hates being on Pandasia, and wants to go home, but as the series progresses, she likes being with the Pandalian Warriors, and even refuses to leave when her parents want her to. She is also very stubborn, and in the beginning, has a disliking forCool. Her wand carries a magical book that holds all the information she needs, along with theBeans. characters.name: Oscar
characters.description: Oscaris a TV reporter notable for his half-white and half-black face. He is obsessed with getting the scoop of the century, and will do anything to find it. He likes to put on his special suit and become Panda Hero, and he is the warrior of the Plasma-Bean. Oscar thinks Bingo and Congo are lazy and self-centered at first, but becomes friends with the twins, and even falls in love with Bingo, who brought out his sensitive side. When she was frozen, Oscar even cried, and was determined to save her. At one point before the series, Oscar saved Max when they were children. He is obsessed with getting the scoop of the century, and will do anything to find it. He likes to put on his special suit and become Panda Hero, and he is the warrior of the Plasma-Bean. characters.name: Toby
characters.description: Tobyis a shy, clumsy, yet sweet panda. He is thrust into a world of adventure when he finds out that he's Pandasia'sChosen One, the Valor Bean Warrior, leader of the seven Pandalian Bean Warriors. The country boy became an employee ofBean TV, thanks to his friendLove, who he seems attracted to (and vice versa). Even thoughCooldislikes him at first, Toby works hard to become his friend and tries to accomplish his job: SavingPandasiafrom KingAudieand KingKulu!

characters.description: Toby's Grandmotheris the grandmother ofToby,YubbyandAbby. She is very kind and believes being friendly can achieve anything. characters.name: Yani
characters.description: Yani: Yani is a little fairy who looks like a toddler. She floats around in a pink bubble, and is the tribe leader of the center island, where Max was born. She is hurt by pollution and destruction of the center island forest, which made her bubble turn dark. In the final episode, the Wisdom Tree in the center of the planet died, and Yani's bubble faded, and she collapsed, nearly dying. When the tree was healed, Yani's bubble reappeared, and she woke up. Yani is the warrior of the Zen-Bean, and always has to talk sense into Oscar.
